name: Dévoreur-Char
description: Char-colosse monté sur chenilles de forage orbital. Son broyeur frontal transforme les fortifications en copeaux de métal. L'avant-garde des sièges de la Ceinture.
prompt: Sci-fi scrap-punk colossal tank, massive ore drilling tracks converted into siege vehicle, giant frontal grinder blade crushing fortified walls, welded scrap armor plating, hydraulic pistons, industrial sparks, dark war-torn landscape, highly detailed, cinematic lighting
